description.value:
You make your fur sparkle and shimmer like a brightly colored gem for 1 hour. When shining, you gain a +2 status bonus to [[/act make-an-impression]] and Performance checks for creatures who can see you, but you take a –1 status penalty to [[/act demoralize]], [[/act hide]], and [[/act sneak]].

Once per day, you can use a single Interact action to shake free some excess glitter and give all adjacent creatures the effects of Shine for 10 minutes. Any creature can Dismiss these effects by brushing the glitter off them as an action, which has the manipulate trait.
